boundary_scope.decision_population: Consumer instalment loan applications, requested amount at or below $10,000, composite risk score at or above 720, no adverse action indicators.
boundary_scope.auto_execution_conditions: Approval may execute without contemporaneous human review where all Band A conditions are satisfied at time of scoring. Any unmet condition routes to human review. All declines escalate.
boundary_scope.excluded_conditions: All declines; fraud flag; thin-file indicator; prior adverse action within 24 months; manual referral.
boundary_scope.review_cadence: Quarterly, and immediately upon material model change or adverse outcome signal.

tier_b.label: Initial establishment of Band A auto-approval

reasoning.narrative: Establishes automated approval for Band A. Model validation for CSE-2 v4.1 shows stable rank-ordering across the 700+ range on a 24-month backtest. Score floor set at 720 with a $10,000 ceiling. Declines are excluded entirely from automation given adverse-action obligations. Decisions remain reversible prior to funding. Quarterly review required; boundary to be revisited on first full cohort performance data.
evidence_relied_upon: Model Validation Report CSE-2 v4.1 (Model Risk Management, 2025-03-12)

ownership.role_at_decision: VP Consumer Credit — Accountable Owner, ENV-CONSUMER-LENDING

retention.retention_basis: Governance record retained for life of boundary plus 10 years
